title: Smoke Check
subtitle: Just a moment of honesty.
question: Did you smoke a cigarette today?
howManyQuestion: How many cigarettes did you smoke?
urgeQuestion: When did the urge feel strongest?
feelQuestion: How do you feel about it now?
reflectionQuestion: What would you like to do differently next time?
reflectionPlaceholder: e.g. Wait 10 min before lighting up
tomorrowOpportunity: Tomorrow is another opportunity — and you're capable of it.
smokeFreeSubheading: That choice matters more than you think.
keepShowingUp: Keep showing up for yourself — it meants it's working.
incredibleConsistency: Incredible consistency — you're proving it to yourself.
halfWeekSmokeFree: More than half the week smoke-free. That's real progress.
everyDayCounts: Every smoke-free day counts. Keep going.
